reference: Boly, Massimini, Tsuchiya, Postle, Koch, Tononi 2017 J Neurosci 37(40):9603-9613 (DOI 10.1523/JNEUROSCI.3218-16.2017)
reason: Requires user wearing EEG + eye-tracker during bistable stimulus viewing across multiple sessions; eye-tracker hardware not yet provisioned

hardware.eye_tracker: Pupil Labs Core or Tobii 4C (NOT YET OWNED — ~$500-700 if needed; or use webcam-based GazeRecorder as zero-cost fallback)
hardware.stimulus_software: PsychoPy (open source) or custom HEXA UI

stimulus_protocol.type: binocular rivalry or Necker cube bistable
stimulus_protocol.preferred: Necker cube (no special optics required); 5deg visual angle, neutral grey background, view 2m distance

no_report_paradigm_steps: Step 2: User views Necker cube freely (no button press); eye tracker records pupil dilation + microsaccade rate
Step 3: Bistable percept switches inferred from optokinetic-nystagmus-like signature (OKN) or pupil dilation transient (Frassle 2014 method)
Step 4: Mark percept-switch timestamps automatically (no subjective report = no-report paradigm)
Step 5: Epoch EEG ±2s around each inferred switch
Step 6: Compare frontal (Fp1/Fp2/F3/F4) vs posterior (P3/P4/O1/O2) ERP amplitudes around switch
Step 7: Boly hypothesis: posterior cortex correlates with percept switch even without report; frontal activity falls away

analysis_pipeline.switch_detection: pupil dilation transient peak detection, FWHM 200-500ms (Frassle 2014)
analysis_pipeline.stats: frontal_erp_amplitude vs posterior_erp_amplitude paired t-test; expected: posterior > frontal at switch (-100 to +200ms)

expected_pass_criterion: Posterior ERP amplitude > frontal ERP amplitude at percept switch (p < 0.05, Cohen d > 0.4)
limitations_vs_paper: Eye-tracker-inferred switches vs Boly's button-press-then-no-report dual paradigm
Necker cube vs binocular rivalry (different bistable mechanism, similar phenomenology)
next_action: User decision — purchase Pupil Labs Core (~$500) OR validate webcam GazeRecorder accuracy on Necker cube task; agent will pre-register protocol once hardware path chosen
